entries.note: Patterns detected before Claude analysis — guiding fix priority

entries.problem: fetchStockQuoteAV in api/morning.js calls fetch() and .json() without content-type validation — if Alpha Vantage returns an error page (HTML/SSE), .json() throws silently and the catch is missing
entries.commit: fix: add content-type check and error handling to fetchStockQuoteAV in morning.js
entries.learned: Alpha Vantage (and similar financial APIs) can return 200 OK with an HTML rate-limit/error page, so content-type validation before .json() is essential even on successful HTTP responses.

entries.problem: Les cartes de prix du Dashboard n'ont pas d'animations stagger ni de micro-interactions au toucher, et la hiérarchie visuelle est faible
entries.commit: fix: add stagger-item and press-scale micro-interactions to Dashboard price ticker cards
entries.learned: Les classes CSS stagger-item et press-scale sont déjà définies dans index.css avec des animations spring physics et peuvent être appliquées directement sur les éléments React via className sans aucun JS supplémentaire.

entries.problem: handleDiscordStream calls .json() on a response that could be SSE (text/event-stream) — but more critically, the outer catch block in handleDiscordStream swallows errors silently without sending any HTTP response, leaving the client hanging
entries.commit: fix: guard res.headersSent in handleDiscordStream catch to prevent hung responses and double writeHead crash
entries.learned: In Node.js SSE handlers, the catch block must always check res.headersSent before calling res.writeHead, otherwise a second writeHead call throws ERR_HTTP_HEADERS_SENT and the client connection hangs with no response body.
